Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Authorizes an occupancy tax in the town of Amherst
Summary: Authorizes an occupancy tax in the town of Amherst, county of Erie, not to exceed 2.5%.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing an occupancy tax in the town of Amherst; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
